description: Extract sender, recipient, subject, and date fields from email text using regex pattern matching on standard email headers
task_description:
Extract the following fields from this email:
- sender
- recipient
- subject
- date

Email:
From: john.doe@example.com
To: jane.smith@company.org
Subject: Q4 Report Review
Date: 2025-01-15

Please review the attached Q4 report.

Return as JSON.

**IMPORTANT: The task provides these input variables:**
- `email_text` (str)

Your workflow MUST use these exact variable names: email_text

**CRITICAL - OUTPUT FORMAT (EXACT STRUCTURE REQUIRED):**
Your activity must return this structure:
```json
{
  "sender": "john.doe@example.com",
  "recipient": "jane.smith@company.org",
  "subject": "Q4 Report Review",
  "date": "2025-01-15"
}
```

**Rules:**
- Match this structure (field names, nesting, types) EXACTLY
- Values will vary by instance, but structure stays the same
- Do NOT add extra fields
- Do NOT change field names

inputs.name: email_text
inputs.description: The complete email text containing headers (From, To, Subject, Date) and body content to parse

output.description: Returns extracted email fields as JSON: {"sender": "john.doe@example.com", "recipient": "jane.smith@company.org", "subject": "Q4 Report Review", "date": "2025-01-15"}

workflow_spec.name: Email Field Extraction
workflow_spec.description: Extracts sender, recipient, subject, and date fields from email text using regex patterns for structured email headers
